title: Pokemon Commands
description: Adds simple in-game commands for Cobblemon to check Pokémon info, weaknesses, resistances, and type matchups without leaving Minecraft.
body:
Ever wondered what a Pokémon is weak to while playing Cobblemon or Pixelmon?
Pokémon Commands adds a set of simple commands that let you look up Pokémon types, weaknesses, resistances, and immunities without leaving Minecraft!
### 
### Features

- ```/pokeinfo <pokemon>``` – Look up detailed information about a specific Pokémon. Shows its typing, weaknesses, resistances, immunities, Base Stats, Base Stat Totals, and the abilities it can have.
- ```/weakness <type>``` – Check the effectiveness chart for a single type.
- ```/weakness <type1> <type2>``` – Enter two types to calculate combined weaknesses, resistances, and immunities.
- Both commands have aliases! ```/pinfo``` and ```/weak```.


### Notes
- This is a utility mod – it doesn’t add Pokémon, only info commands.
- Works great alongside Cobblemon or any other Pokémon-themed modpack.
- Data comes from the official type chart and Pokédex entries.
